---
title: "04_EDA"
output: html_document
date: "2025-03-06"
---

# Environment

```{r}
library(dplyr)

```

# Load File

```{r}
final_dataset <- (
  readRDS(
    "~/projects/vacunas_brands_2025/Rfiles/final_dataset_brands.rds"
  )
)
```

# EDA vacunas covid

```{r}
#Look at 1-shot combination
table_vac_1shot <- table(final_dataset[final_dataset$n_vacunas_covid == "Una", ]$shot_1)
df_table_vac_1shot <- as.data.frame(table_vac_1shot) %>% 
  filter(Freq > 0) %>% 
  mutate(Percent = round(100 * Freq / sum(Freq), 2)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Percent))

#Look at 2-shot combination
table_vac_2shot <- table(final_dataset[final_dataset$n_vacunas_covid == "Dos", ]$all_three_shots)
df_table_vac_2shot <- as.data.frame(table_vac_2shot) %>%
  filter(Freq > 0) %>% 
  mutate(Percent = round(100 * Freq / sum(Freq), 2)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Percent))

#Look at 3-shot combination
table_vac_3shot <- table(final_dataset[final_dataset$n_vacunas_covid == "Tres", ]$all_three_shots)
df_table_vac_3shot <- as.data.frame(table_vac_3shot) %>% 
  filter(Freq > 0) %>% 
  mutate(Percent = round(100 * Freq / sum(Freq), 2)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Percent))
```

# Exclusion criteria
## Age
```{r}
print(paste("Number of rows before exclusion criteria:", nrow(final_dataset)))

# Age
print("Age variable")
summary(final_dataset$age)
hist(final_dataset$age, breaks = 100, main = "Distribución de age", xlab = "Años")

# Nº of rows exluding certain groups
nrow(subset(final_dataset, age>=100))
```

## Days from last immunization
```{r}

# Days from last immunization
print("Days since immunization variable")
summary(final_dataset$ultima_inmun_infecc_dias)
hist(final_dataset$ultima_inmun_infecc_dias, breaks = 100, main = "Distribution of Days from last immunization", xlab = "Days")

## Calculate percentile 95
p95_days <- quantile(final_dataset$ultima_inmun_infecc_dias, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)
print(paste("Percentile 95 is:", p95_days))

# Creation of groups
final_dataset_excluded <- final_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    # Create grouped bands for "days since last immunization/infection"
    ultima_inmun_infecc_grouped = case_when(
      ultima_inmun_infecc_dias >= 0  & ultima_inmun_infecc_dias <= 50  ~ "14-50",   
      ultima_inmun_infecc_dias > 50  & ultima_inmun_infecc_dias <= 125 ~ "51-125", 
      ultima_inmun_infecc_dias > 125 & ultima_inmun_infecc_dias <= 180 ~ "126-180",
      ultima_inmun_infecc_dias > 180 & ultima_inmun_infecc_dias <= 247 ~ "181-247",
      ultima_inmun_infecc_dias > 247 ~ ">247",                                     
      TRUE ~ "No previous immunization"
    ),
    # Set factor levels in the desired order
    ultima_inmun_infecc_grouped = factor(
      ultima_inmun_infecc_grouped,
      levels = c("None", "14-50", "51-125", "126-180", "181-247", ">247")
    )
  )

table(final_dataset_excluded$ultima_inmun_infecc_grouped)

saveRDS(final_dataset_excluded, file = "~/projects/vacunas_brands_2025/Rfiles/final_dataset_brands_excluded.rds")

```
